name: 熊刀（★） | 蓝钢
descriptionEn: This tanto-style survival knife features a faceted blade and full tang, complete with impact pommel. No fuss, no moving parts - just a reliable blade that's ready to work. It has been cold blued. This is the malbec of weapon design - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 这把日式短刀风格的求生刀具拥有多面刀刃和带握点的全刀柄。没有任何多余的部分 - 一把时刻准备战斗的可靠武器。 这把武器已完全被染蓝。 堪称武器设计中的马尔贝克 - 军火商布兹
